name: Google Meet
description: Agent joins Google Meet as observer or wake-word participant. Local whisper transcription, DOM speaker attribution, post-meeting Google Doc + summary.

configSchema.label: Loopback WebSocket Port
configSchema.description: Port the gateway listens on (127.0.0.1 only). The extension must use this port.

configSchema.label: Wake-Word Phrases
configSchema.description: Comma-separated list of phrases that flip the bot from observer to active. Case-insensitive.

configSchema.label: Silence Before Returning to Passive
configSchema.description: Milliseconds of silence after the bot stops speaking before returning to passive listen.

configSchema.label: Bot Display Name
configSchema.description: Prefix added to the bot's Meet display name where Meet allows renaming.

configSchema.label: Whisper Model Path
configSchema.description: Override path to the whisper GGML model. Empty = reuse voice-input-stt's model.
